final:
module RefModule(
    input CLK,
    input en,
    input [15:0] BPSK,
    input [15:0] AWGN,
    output reg en_status = 0,
    output reg [16:0] BPSK_AWGN = 0
);  wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always@(posedge CLK or posedge dbg_halt)begin
	if(en == 1'b1)begin
		BPSK_AWGN = AWGN + BPSK;
		en_status = 1;
	end else begin
		BPSK_AWGN = 0;
		en_status = 0;
	end
end
endmodule
